core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Industrial Precision with Swiss Clarity.
Emotion First: The UI must feel 'Reliable' and 'Heavy-Duty'.
Content is King: Data density is the feature, not the bug.
Contrast: High contrast is non-negotiable for factory floor visibility.
Negative Space: Use it to group complex data, not just for aesthetics.
anti_patterns: No low-contrast gray text on dark backgrounds.
No 'Card' overuse - use clean lines and borders instead.

rules: Headings (h1-h3): Barlow Condensed, Weight 600/700, Uppercase for section titles.

Ticket_Card.style: bg-card border border-border rounded-sm p-3 hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer group relative overflow-hidden
structure: Left Border: 4px solid status color (Rush=Red, etc).
Header: Flex row, Order # (Mono) | Client Name (Truncate).
Body: Grid cols-2, Branding (Text-xs text-muted-foreground) | Qty (Mono Text-sm).
Footer: Due Date (Badge variant='outline') | Priority (Badge variant='default').

Board_Column.style: min-w-[320px] max-w-[320px] bg-secondary/20 rounded-lg p-2 flex flex-col gap-2 h-full border border-border/50
Board_Column.header_style: flex justify-between items-center p-2 mb-2 font-barlow font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-sm sticky top-0 bg-background/80 backdrop-blur z-10

Filter_Bar.style: h-14 border-b bg-background/95 backdrop-blur flex items-center px-4 gap-4 sticky top-0 z-50

Detail_Modal.style: max-w-4xl max-h-[90vh] overflow-hidden grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3
Detail_Modal.layout: Left: 2 cols (Form Fields). Right: 1 col (Comments/History/Files) with distinct bg-muted/30.

layout.dashboard: The 'Control Tower'. Full viewport height (h-screen). Hidden overflow on body.
structure: Middle: Filter Bar (Board Selector, Date Range, Status Filters).
Main: Horizontal Scroll Canvas (flex-row gap-4 p-4 overflow-x-auto h-[calc(100vh-8rem)]).
layout.spacing: Compact. Use gap-2 for lists, gap-4 for layout sections.

visual_enhancers.mono_numbers: All financial, quantity, and date data MUST use JetBrains Mono.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text on badges has 4.5:1 contrast. Avoid white text on yellow/orange backgrounds - use dark text instead.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible ring-2 ring-primary ring-offset-2 ring-offset-background on all interactive elements.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import to index.css immediately.
2. CONFIGURE TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js to include the new font families (barlow, inter, mono) and custom colors.
3. SCAFFOLD LAYOUT: Create the DashboardLayout component with the fixed header and horizontal scroll area.
4. BUILD TICKET COMPONENT: Create the 'OrderCard' component. It is the atom of this app. Make it dense but legible.
5. IMPLEMENT BOARD: Use 'react-beautiful-dnd' or '@hello-pangea/dnd' (if available) for the Kanban columns.
6. DATA MOCKING: Create a robust 'mockData.js' with 20+ orders across different statuses to test the density.
7. DETAILS MODAL: Use Shadcn Dialog. Make it wide (max-w-4xl). Split it into 'Order Details' (left) and 'Collaboration' (right).
8. GLOBAL SEARCH: Implement a 'Cmd+K' style command palette using Shadcn Command component.
CRITICAL: Do not use gradient backgrounds for the main dashboard. It must be solid dark for readability.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Use full-width, dense grids.
Create depth through 1px borders and subtle background differences (Zinc 900 vs Zinc 950).
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing (padding) inside containers than you think, but keep GAPS tight (gap-2) to group related data.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes.
